title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Medical Officer with drive and ambition, Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited:
Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited!
